title: isocoma menziesii var. tridentata
intro: Isocoma menziesii var. tridentata, also known as Resin Bush or Island Yarrow, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the coastal regions of California in the United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Resin Bush include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
